name: punchwall-hybrid-physics-lunge
description: Validate persistent server-owned structural rubble, detached re-impact physics, finishing destruction, capped hybrid debris, client-only visual shards, and a wind-up plus unobstructed 10.5-stud forward punch lunge without target rotation.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local hrp=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart hrp.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-40)) local beforePosition,beforeLook=hrp.Position,hrp.CFrame.LookVector local r=c:Invoke("PunchRadius") local moved=(hrp.Position-beforePosition).Magnitude local lookDelta=(hrp.CFrame.LookVector-beforeLook).Magnitude return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,lunge=r.lungeDistance,moved=moved,lookDelta=lookDelta,broken=r.BrokenDepthBlocks,power=r.Power,coins=r.Coins,serverChunks=r.PhysicsFragments})

steps.label: wind-up punch lunges forward without rotating

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local folder=workspace:FindFirstChild("Local Punch Debris") local count,collidable=0,0 if folder then for _,d in ipairs(folder:GetChildren()) do if d:GetAttribute("LocalVisualDebris") then count+=1 if d.CanCollide then collidable+=1 end end end end local gui=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD return H:JSONEncode({count=count,collidable=collidable,windup=gui:GetAttribute("PunchWindupSeconds"),lunge=gui:GetAttribute("PunchLungeStuds")})

steps.label: client owns eight non-colliding visual shards

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) c:Invoke("HitDepthBlock",{layer=1,column=6,row=1}) c:Invoke("HitDepthBlock",{layer=1,column=7,row=1}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(1000,10,1000),Vector3.new(1000,10,1010)) local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local falling,serverOwned,unanchored=0,0,0 for _,b in ipairs(root["Depth Blocks"]:GetChildren()) do if b:GetAttribute("StructuralFalling") then falling+=1 if not b.Anchored then unanchored+=1 end local ok,owner=pcall(function() return b:GetNetworkOwner() end) if ok and owner==nil then serverOwned+=1 end end end local snap=c:Invoke("Snapshot") return H:JSONEncode({lastCollapse=root:GetAttribute("LastStructuralCollapseCount"),active=root:GetAttribute("ActiveStructuralFalling"),falling=falling,serverOwned=serverOwned,unanchored=unanchored,broken=snap.BrokenDepthBlocks,detached=snap.DetachedDepthBlocks,serverChunks=snap.PhysicsFragments})

steps.label: two missing supports trigger server-owned structural cascade
wait for structural blocks to settle naturally

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local visible,unanchored,anchored,collidable,queryable,moved=0,0,0,0,0,0 for _,b in ipairs(root["Depth Blocks"]:GetChildren()) do if b:GetAttribute("StructuralDetached") then if b.Transparency==0 then visible+=1 end if b.Anchored then anchored+=1 else unanchored+=1 end if b.CanCollide then collidable+=1 end if b.CanQuery then queryable+=1 end local base=b:GetAttribute("BaseCFrame") if base and (b.Position-base.Position).Magnitude>1 then moved+=1 end end end local active=root:GetAttribute("ActiveStructuralFalling") local settled=active==0 and visible>0 and unanchored==0 and anchored==visible and collidable==visible and queryable==visible and moved==visible return H:JSONEncode({active=active,visible=visible,unanchored=unanchored,anchored=anchored,collidable=collidable,queryable=queryable,moved=moved,settled=settled})

steps.label: fallen blocks settle and persist at their natural physics positions

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=1,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local name="DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02" local r=c:Invoke("HitDepthBlock",name) local b=workspace.PunchWallRPG["Depth Blocks"]:FindFirstChild(name) return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,outcome=r.outcome,detached=r.detached,hp=r.hp,impactAt=b:GetAttribute("LastDetachedImpactAt"),launchSpeed=b:GetAttribute("LastDetachedLaunchSpeed"),falling=b:GetAttribute("StructuralFalling"),stillVisible=b.Transparency==0,stillCollidable=b.CanCollide,stillQueryable=b.CanQuery})

steps.label: punching fallen rubble makes it bounce without deleting it
wait for detached impact physics step

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local b=workspace.PunchWallRPG["Depth Blocks"].DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02 local origin=b:GetAttribute("DetachedImpactOrigin") return H:JSONEncode({moved=origin and (b.Position-origin.Position).Magnitude or 0,unanchored=not b.Anchored})

steps.label: fallen block moves from its settled position under impulse

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local name="DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02" local r=c:Invoke("HitDepthBlock",name) local b=workspace.PunchWallRPG["Depth Blocks"]:FindFirstChild(name) local snap=c:Invoke("Snapshot") return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,outcome=r.outcome,detached=r.detached,broken=b:GetAttribute("Broken"),hidden=b.Transparency==1,collidable=b.CanCollide,queryable=b.CanQuery,detachedRemaining=snap.DetachedDepthBlocks,brokenTotal=snap.BrokenDepthBlocks,serverChunks=snap.PhysicsFragments})

steps.label: fallen rubble disappears only after a finishing punch
